description_long: This is a stylized humanoid figure with pointed elf-like ears and short, layered hair. The figure is dressed in a fitted, off-shoulder top and shorts, accented with bands and trim at the arms, legs, and waist. The outfit includes high boots with prominent soles and heels, and there are two thin, rod-like accessories extending from the waist area. The figure's arms are outstretched to the sides, and the hands are gloveless. A headband and a visible band on the thigh add to the character's distinctive, fantasy-inspired appearance.
description: A stylized humanoid with elf-like ears, short hair, and a fitted fantasy outfit with boots and accessories. The figure stands upright with arms outstretched and features unique head and waist adornments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, pointed ears, and the full length of the boots and waist accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered hairstyle, and the side silhouette of the outfit and boots.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, headband, off-shoulder top, shorts, and the front details of the boots and accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the right-side silhouette of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-inspired fitted top and shorts with high boots and headband
